reviews.review_text:
The park is maticulasly maintained the staff are wonderful and I highly recommend staying here.
Faultless.
Caravan/cabin park close to the water. Caravan sites are was large and accessible. Amenities modern and clean

What a lovely spot!  Dog friendly with a dog park and on leash dog beaches just a stroll away.  Great dog friendly pub across the road for a good steak and glass of wine.  Sites are wonderful, amenities emaculate and staff awesome.  Highly recommend for a stay.

The staff and manager at the park are wonderful people, cabins.....older but great view of the water.......unfortunately that is where it ends.|The cabins, whilst water view are lovely , they back on the the carpark with VMR. This carpark is a gathering for rude, abnoxious, self absorbed and lack of respect youth! They will hoon all hours of the night, swear at the top of their lungs, yell abuse to peolle who attempt to move them on and there is not one thing the police can do about it. |Staying in the cabins is just not worth the money. I will be demanding a decent discount. If this information was disclosed prior to booking I would have never booked.
Great location. Great park lovely people.
Great location and dog friendly. The mozzies are crazy, they offer spray for 20$ a bottle when they could just put in plants. It's crazy. the price is very steep. Come on guys

We stayed here for 2 weeks and it was, unfortunately, our least satisfactory stay in Australia.

This campground is not suited for a quiet or restful stay. Noise levels are consistently high, from early morning to late at night: loud bird activity at sunrise and sunset, vehicle noise from the adjacent parking area, early departures (from around 4:30am), a water truck operating for extended periods every day, music from the amenities 24/7, and live music from the nearby pub on weekends. There is little to no quiet time.

The environment also did not feel particularly safe or comfortable at times. We experienced multiple night disturbances involving intoxicated individuals (including shouting, vomiting, and general disruption), on more than one occasion during our stay. Police presence was frequent, including daytime patrols, and the adjacent parking area regularly saw cars revving engines, doing laps, and driving erratically at night.

Facilities are limited. There is no proper kitchen (only one BBQ plate and a single sink), and the laundry consists of two coin-operated machines, one of which was out of order during our stay. The cooking area was also affected by insect infestations on multiple occasions since it's outside.

We were advised there are only four designated tent sites, all located in high-traffic or noisy areas. During our stay, we were relocated to a site with significant tree roots, positioned between the entrance gate and the exit gate.

The location by the river also results in a high presence of mosquitoes and sandflies, which significantly impacts comfort.

Positive points are limited to clean amenities and the coffee van (“The Little Brew Bus”) at the entrance, which offers good coffee and friendly service.

Overall, this campground may suit very short stays, but is not appropriate for those seeking a quiet, comfortable, or relaxed environment.

Our favourite place of camping ..

Been there once booked in again for Easter

We were put on a site that we didn’t book for some reason. We were placed along the fence adjacent to the road behind us between huge ghost gums which dropped a few branches. Very tight to reverse the van in. The park itself is next to the boat ramp, swimming enclosure and tavern. This is midgee heaven and I suggest you have a portable fire pit and heaps of RID with you.

Jacobs well caravan park was the get away i needed.
Staff very nice helped a dumbie set up his tent.
Was little disappointed when I returned 5days later only to be turned away and told dogs In tents will no longer be allowed.
Due to them being left in there whilst owners go out.
Them people shouldn't have  dogs and it seems they ruined it for others.
All and all is a beautiful place to be.
Thankyou to all the staff and the nice lady with coffee stand out front whom always made my puppy  a puppycheno.
Will & mouse

Great place to stay and relax. Very clean . The staff are  friendly and welcoming .Has a beautiful little van parked at the front where you can get your morning coffee and a few snacks.  Close to the water for boating and fishing. Will definitely be going to stay again. Had a great time.

This was our first caravan park to stay in ever in Australia. It has beautiful shade cover with trees, abundant bird life , and lots of dog friendly amenities. You can walk down to the water and see the boats. We did see a few mosquitoes, but since it rained the whole time we were there it wasn’t so bad. The bathroom and shower facilities are very nice. There is close access to stores like Aldi , Bunning’s and BCF. There’s even a Costco nearby. My only negative was the hotel across the street which played loud music on a Saturday night till around midnight. But overall it was a great first experience . @williswanderings

Stayed one night and couldn’t leave early enough. This park is on a swamp and full of mozzies and midgies all day long. Then you have long term homeless druggies and drunks to deal with. Lock up your stuff. Noisy, not safe and over priced.

Just returned from spending 3 days at the tourIst park. The park is in great condition and is cared for exceedingly well. Excellent amenities, shady sites and well equipped, delightful cabins There were 5 of us, all 70+, and we utilised a cabin and both powered and unpowered sites. All agreed that this was an excellent park which greatly contributed to a most memorable and enjoyable experience.

Gerne, hier eine kurze Version:

Der Campingplatz selbst ist nichts Besonderes und die Lage leider sehr schlecht. In der Umgebung gibt es praktisch nichts zu unternehmen, zur Küste fährt man jedes Mal sehr lange, und der vorhandene Strand ist nur ein winziger, unschöner Abschnitt.
Positiv sind die sehr sauberen Toiletten und die saubere Küche sowie der leckere Kaffeestand am Morgen. Insgesamt zwar angenehm, aber wegen der schlechten Lage nicht empfehlenswert.

Just visited to walk my dog and grabbed a coffee to go.
Peaceful. Great park nearby. I envy those who live here.
Top class caravan park

Absolutely fantastic caravan park. Location Location as they say.
Right next to the Pub and boat ramp.
Also next to a bottle shop and petrol station.
Fish & Chip shop and convenience store.
You have everything you need within 100 meters from the front gate.
Amenities are clean and tidy.
There is a little coffee van shop on site.
You just can’t go wrong.
Louise and her husband are the managers and all the staff are helpful and friendly.
Nice place for a holiday
One place I'll never go back to

Hidden Gem! One of the nicest cleanest  camping grounds and amenities I've been too all security coded boomgates and bathrooms and privaye access to beach, 5 minutes walk to beach and playgrounds, dog friendly, cleaniest  bathrooms ever, plenty of toilets and showers the winner for me was the accessible/family bathroom, wheelchair friendly, baby change table, accessible/ wheelchair  friendly toilet, handrails etc, even has fold down seating in shower and large extra shower seat, for me with children and mobility issues this was a godsend, and again cleaned daily Top notch, there a camp kitchen with sink, BBQ, kettle, microwave/ grill and a fridge and plenty of seating, flat level well maintained camp sites, flat roads, boat and car wash area and even a coffee van for that needed morning caffeine hit, friendly grocer, service station, fish and chips, pharmacy and sushi all within 5 minutes walk this place is def 10/10 oh and free WIFI in park too, only thing I didnt approve of were my introduction to the local midgies( sandflies) ouch!!! Lol But the office does sell all natural midgy bite, creams and sprays by " the well within" oh washers and dryers iron avail too

It's not a bad park, but honestly, $90 a night for an unpowered site with water views ... across the car park!!  Very noisy, lots of riff raff, drunks, speeding cars and motorbikes all night long, not to mention the midgies and mozzies. When they say bring your repellent, don't bring a can bring a box!||On a positive note, the other people camping in the park were very friendly and up for a chat. Toilets and showers were clean and looked quite new. ||Park is well laid out, quite small and has several sites with water views, one again over the car park. ||Not somewhere we would visit again and left 2 days early due to the biting insects after dark.

We stayed here over the weekend before Christmas, having never been to Jacobs Well before. It was just an awesome place to stay. Our site for the caravan was huge, one of the biggest site caravan parks we have stayed. The owners were lovely, providing us with wood for our fire pit. We also were able to bring our dog without any hassle. There are some lovely small touches around the place: herb garden, coffee caravan at the front. We also ate at the Tavern across the road from the park, which we totally recommend. We will definitely be back. Despite being only 45 mins from Brisbane and less to the Gold Coast, driving through sugar cane country made it felt like we were out in the countryside. Super close to the netted beach, and the perfect place to take your boat. A relaxing weekend of swimming and toasting marshmallows.

Had a short 2 night break away,  in one of the Cabins.|Great way to unwind.    Sit and look at the water ,  even had a Kookaburra sit just outside the cabin one night. ||The only downfall was only having 2 nights.  Next time will be longer.
This place is great been there twice now sites are great bathrooms are always clean, the staff at jacobs well tourist Park they are so lovely and kind. Always there to help.

Jacobs Well Tourist Park is a lovely little park.|We recently stayed there three nights in Villa 5, a beautiful two bedroom fully self-contained Villa with everything we needed, it was very roomy & clean, complete with a built-in BBQ on the deck, great for cooking Bacon & Eggs for breaky, or Tea at night.  Sit on the deck & enjoy the beautiful views.||Jacobs Well Tourist Park is a lovely little dog-friendly park located straight across from the local shops & Tavern. It is well maintained, clean & tidy.||We enjoyed our stay & will definitely recommend & we will be back.
Lovely relaxing spot.

Jacobs Well Tourist Park is a lovely little dog-friendly park located straight across from the local shops & Tavern. Then once on the deck of your Villa you can enjoy the beautiful views.

We recently stayed there three nights in Villa 5, a beautiful two bedroom fully self-contained Villa with everything we needed, complete with a built-in BBQ on the deck, great for cooking Bacon & Eggs for breaky. Thank you for allowing Dogs in your Villa's  we always travel with our fur-child.

We enjoyed our stay & will definitely recommend & we will be back.
A nice dog friendly park. Room for my largish caravan. Friendly owners and staff.
Very cool

Absolutely amazing little dog friendly park .When they say dog friendly they mean it , from the off leash area to the the dog treats they gave our dog . Plus you can grab a coffee from the on site coffee van to have while the dog run in the full fenced off leash area . THe park was extremely clean and the staff were amazing . And the view was amazing . Very quiet relaxing time had by me and my wife  and our 4 legged child . For a small town they a good choice of food options ,try the tavern great food . These guys are doing it right and giving a wonderful place to relax and unwind in a great setting . The amenities were a highlight with how clean and well maintained they are . we are so glad we stayed  thanks to everyone .

Don't bother booking a site and paying because they will change it, the new management is perthethic, we booked our site with our bus , payed, and received a site that was not appropriate for us, they didn't give a shit!! Too many numbers, codes, etc!! Not good customer service at all!! We have been coming here for over 19 years, Never again!! It's all about the money with them, not family oriented at all!!

Jacobs Well Tourist Park was way better than expected! The location is amazing, and although it’s rated as a 3-star park, I honestly can’t find any faults. I’d definitely recommend this park — kids would never get bored, as there’s so much to do in the area.

After reading previous reviews, I came prepared just in case the midges were an issue, but thankfully during my stay they weren’t a problem at all — the can stayed untouched!

You’re so close to both the Gold Coast and Brisbane, yet it feels so peaceful and far removed. A great spot overall.
Great place for a short weekend, friendly people, nice friendly staff and very dog friendly 👍🤪🐶🐶🐶🐶🐶🐶🇦🇺❤️🇮🇱

It's a nice park in a tucked away location not far from the Gold Coast. Quite a bit of dirt to set up camp largely due to the lack of rain recently. Unfortunately our trip was cut short by the midgies and sandflies. They were relentless despite us being diligent with repellant. We left a day early due to our littles ones and us adults getting smashed with bites. Facilities were clean and it's great location to the water. If you're boating, the jetskies are plentiful and pretty inconsiderate on the water, suggest avoiding the weekends if possible. The fish and chip shop across the road was awesome. Feedback for the park that can be controlled - the number of different codes was beyond frustrating and inconvenient. Different codes for mens bathroom, womens bathroom, laundry, entry and exit gate, pedestrian gate is jist crazy, understand security but surely some can be combined. Unfortunately as a whole we likely won't be returning.
Nice quite place. Make sure to bring Mosquito repellent

Terrible spot. Stayed on a powered site. Was suppose to stay for 5, only stayed one due to tiny midget bugs, everywhere. My kids, husband and I got about 30bites each in one night. Staff didn’t care at all. Don’t recommend staying and not a cheap place.

Nice location and decent quality facilities, you would have no idea you are near the good coast, it's a tiny country town surrounded by cane fields. Pet friendly, and on weekends they have a coffee van. The only downside was that we were absolutely savaged by sand flies/midgies, make sure you wear long sleeves/pants/socks and bring out all of your insect repellents.

Great location for boaters and fisherman , the park staff are wonderful, facilities are clean. Shops on one side the bakery has the best pies and doughnuts! and water on the other. BUT! Midges galore! No grass , water way is great for boats and fishing but not inviting for swimming . Although it dose have netted off area. Make sure you are inside when they pump out the sewage from toilets ! The smell is horrendous. Pub across the road had bands playing and very loud.
Friendly staff and good sized sites. There needs to be more warnings about the midgies and advice about which products work best.
Amanda's Coffee Van is a must have.

We enjoyed our stay here very much at Jacobs Well Tourist Park in our caravan,the park is well maintained,the amenities are cleaned well daily,all the staff were helpfull and very accommodating,shops,bakery,pub are all accross the road would have no hesitation in recommending staying here,hope to return again in my travels,thanks.

Have arrived today for a few days vacation by the sea. You don't get much closer than this park here.
Just a short stroll thru the car park sees one at waters edge beside the Qld Coast Guard headquarters and this spot has been refurbished with the park it has really quite large powered van sites . These site at waterside are $50 nightly for 2 adults and your furry friends. This park is close to every thing in town . The friendly grocer, family chemist and the bakery are literally across the road from the park. The oub us next door to the shops and you don't get much closer than that. Jacobs Well us a quiet town and a relaxed easy feel to it. There's quite a few fisherman and boats at the park and I'd hazard a guess it's driven by the huge price increases in Brisbane as the area population explodes and makes Jacobs well a steal. Looking forward to my stay here as it is a nice relaxed little town with plenty to do and see. 10/10

Stayed here and location nice. Park very ordinary  and very little grass on sites and mostly dirt.  Grass not been mowed in our area for about 2 months with rubbish scattered everywhere. Not worth the nightly tariff of $60.  Laundry was filthy and unswept for weeks.  Machines needed a good wipe over. And to top it off park has sandflies and midges  in plague proportions. Would not recommend this place for a  holiday!!
Good place

Had a family wedding close by and hired 3 cabins.. I  usually stay in apartments or hotels and was very pleasantly surprised.  They were well appointed, comfortable and everything you needed.  Such a  delightful position by the water.
Staff were extremely friendly, helpful and kind. Everything was clean and well maintained. Honestly felt like a home away from home. Highly recommend!!
Totally recommend
Great little park, friendly staff, very clean ammenities, close to the water and pub. Will be back.
Great little park , nice and quiet. Clean and close to what I needed
Great spot to park the van & have a fish.

We take our caravan here frequently as it’s close to home and a great location to relax. The pub has an outdoor stage where bands play on the weekends. You can even hear the music from the caravan park across the road.
We had a powered site for our van
Great but not during holidays.
The manager was very friendly and helpful

Great for a few days getaway .. easily reached inside of a hour from Brisbane and Tweed. ||Numerous shaded sites, excellent amenities and quiet surrounds.||Within walking distance of JW Hotel which has excellent lunch and dinner menus and for those hooked on coffee the local coffee shop will not disappoint.

Beware of midgies !!!Осторожно - много мелких кровососущих мошек.!! Место вполне хорошее,если бы не мелкие мухи(мошки)которые в большом количестве есть в этом месте. То ли это песчаные мухи,то ли блохи с птиц,но бороться бесполезно,мы скупили в магазине пол отдела репеллентов,мазали на тело,зажигали палочки,спирали и тд.При укусе остаются следы на несколько дней  и чешутся постоянно,Никакие репелленты не помогают,больше сюда не ногой

Disappointed in the customer service and understand of this park unfortunately we had to cancel our stay on Thursday due to our 2YR old having gastro we lost the full amount of our stay for 3 nights, I understand a fee for late notice but the full amount is ridiculous, would have been happy with even a 50% credit it's a shame as we don't live far and often visit jacobs well but won't be booking again & most definitely wouldn't recommend
All the workers are kind and it is a great place for holidays it is just a great place if you want fun but also quiet

Great stay lovely staff made my welcome easy and extremely enjoyably . Amenities are very very clean.. grounds are kept spot on and I got to stay an extra week thank you … 3 weeks I didn’t want to leave to be honest

It is a long way from anywhere. We were nearly eaten alive by midgies. It was not an overly pleasant place because of that. Bathroom facilities were good. The burger shop over the road was brilliant....best south of Noosaville. Other than that, I wouldn't rush back. Management was a bit too inquisitive for comfort. The worst was all the passcodes in and out of every door. Sure security is important but why a separate code for everything? We had to walk around with a long list. It was too much. And the last night we stayed they changed all passcodes and forgot to tell everyone.
Nice clean park on the river & pet friendly 😎😎😎

The positives, we enjoyed the close proximity to the water, convenient location. Shops/ pub right across the road. Easy walks. Dog friendly.

The negatives, if they stepped up their services to give value for the money it would be a great park, but they seem to charge top dollar and give minimal service.
Upon entry there is no real check in parking area.
The boom gates are there for a reason but are not always operational.
The roads are not maintained and are in a state of disrepair.
The sites have poor drainage, both in ponding and wastewater.
The park rules are not enforced.
The security systems all have different codes which is just a pure hindrance to the residents and no security against outside people.
The Midgie control is nil.
The rates are high for the service you get.

.
Fabulous
Leider hatten wir einen Platz für unseren Campervan auf dem Sand. Das war etwas blöd. Und leider kein WLAN. Aber ansonsten ein netter Platz
We stayed in our own caravan on a large, powered dog site. What a great little park! We had a lovely weekend! Friendly, helpful staff, clean amenities, great location! Have even booked to go back!
Great location ,well maintained, cabin was brilliant 👍💀
Great spot and dog friendly, happy with this as lots of parks are not and we won't stay anywhere unless they accept our dog to travel with us as well.
Enjoyed a night out with the kids. Friendly staff, clean toilets, great fishing spot. Everything you need is across the road at the shops
Nice quite spot to stay, good level sites
Arrived recently and couldn't be more happy with the service from front desk , the sites (dogo area) are great and lrg..made me feel really welcome..😊
Quiet, peaceful park on beautiful river. Has everything you need in a small village, you don't need to travel for groceries. Amenities clean. Absolutely recommend and we will definitely be back soon.
Some caravan sites are a bit small it's a tight squeeze. Amenities are great.

Great stay on an unpowered tent site, super clean amenities,  camp ground kitchen with fridge, coffee jug, toaster,microwave bbq plates table seating over looking the water! So peaceful , nice bit of paradise so close by, just a few steps away from Some of the yummiest food places,Jacobs Well Tavern, The Well Bakery although the pies were awesome,  my croissant was burnt and rubbery, Fish and chip shop to die for across the road! Rates at the camp grounds very cheap, last minute booking for 2 nights $114.00 2 adults, very clean spacious site, really enjoyed our stay, very friendly staff, loads of cleaners on-site 24/7, great recycling bay and rubbish area, cleaned regularly,  impressed 👍

Awesome park and staff !

Special thanks to Leah in reception for getting the caravan booked in through the busy holiday period !!
Also, to the yards- person for being a all round decent guy, always having the time to stop and chat while keeping the place immaculate.

Just an amazing place. Very good fishing. And so many birds in the area. Really cool to listen to all the sounds!

The owners are just amazing. Helpful wherever they can. Can only recommend this place.

The only downside was that we had to move on after two days as our trip did not permit us to stay longer...

This park has been great, originally planned on a week or 2 while travelling as I have family in the area but due to its cost we weren't expecting much and were pleasantly surprised. The staff have been great, we have extended our stay twice and will have stayed here 4 weeks by the time we leave, yes the birds can be noisy at times and apparently the midges are bad in the hotter months but there is great fishing just 100 metres away, have pulled in a lot of big bream with my nephew, it's dog friendly and while Jacobs Well is a small sleepy town, you are right in the middle of it and they do have a nice bakery, sushi shop, fish and chip takeaway and pub.
Great open park with great amenities, great access to the water, safe swimming area, and good boat ramp.

Parked the RV here for a week. Great location with major shopping centre at Pimpama only 20 minutes away. Local services include an excellent bakery, fish and chipper and pub just across the road. Medical centre and a small supermarket in the same complex. Boat hire and charters directly behind park. Great park for some R&R.
Great place. Very clean and nice people
Nice fishing spot. Drive there was something different with nothing but sugarcane plantations on either side.

My husband & I stayed in our caravan with our cat. This is the 4th year we have stayed here. The amenities are clean & all staff are friendly & helpful. Thankyou to Leah & the other office staff who are professional, friendly & accommodating. We had a family emergency & the staff went above & beyond in trying to accommodate us beyond when we were originally booked. This is not the first time staff here have shown compassion, & we appreciate what they have done for us. So nice to be able to have our cat with us......not many places allow cats🤷
Anne & Richard Box
Lovely spot. Quiet camp ground.
We stayed in our caravan. Great spot but sand flies are a real issue. Facilities are clean and nice and easy walking to everything you need (shops, pub, cafe)

Stinks, bird and bat lice in excess. They Dont even bother to clean it up. We asked for our road to be clean of all the muck. They said its done Mondays. Very unkempt. Would not recommend it to anyone. So glad we left early.

Great place
Excellent views 👏
Very welcoming staff 😀

Great location, facilities and staff.  We stayed in our caravan on
Powered site.
Ich möchte nie wieder woanders hingehen. Ich bin hier glücklich. Der Mond ist rund und die Erde ist flach. Ich habe auch einige bunte Truthähne gesehen. Es könnten die Drogen gewesen sein
Watch out for the mosquitoes!

Well nikki the manager booked us in for this week end as we had plans but when we got there today the 12th she had booked us in, in 3 weeks time not this week end but the lady in the office was so nice refunded our money, and now we are staying in a motel which has cost us more for the 2 nights... so just make sure you get your confitmed email on dates as we didnt

Lots of mosquitoes and midges there in the summer. We buy lots of spray, coils , soov gel, tiger balm and body cream for midgets and mosquitoes. But it not works at all. We have to leave 2 days earlier and change our holiday plan. Not enjoyable at all

I was on this park many times. Always we enjoyed visiting Jacobs Well. We make friends. Children's can play safely araund Staff are very helpful. Contacts us for any news, e invites for activities on the Park.
Lovely place

Stayed at this park, for first 2 weeks December 2023 in cabin number 4.
Cabin not very clean,half a roll of toilet paper on toilet roll holder no spares
Not offered clean linen or towels.
Car park between park and river very noisy on Friday/Saturday night
We got absolutely smashed from the bloody mosquitoes and midges.
Definitely not my favourite place.
Cabin not worth the price
Shane Britten/Canverra
Great for families

Positive : amenities are nice and clean. Near jetty (if you like fishing)
Negative : very very expensive for a camp ground.
Note; BE AWARE OF MIDGES & MOSQUITOS, they managed to get through our mesh tent because they’re so small. We woke up covered in bites so had to leave a day early.

We are newbies to this caravanning lark. We retired last year and are planning a big (ish) lap in the new year.
This is our first set up after leaving the dealers 2 weeks ago.
So glad we picked this site. The Managers are so good!! Very friendly and helpful. We are on a site with power and water. Not game enough to go off grid just yet!!
Can't fault their attention to detail.
Lovely site near the water. Pub and shops nearby. Recommended 👍
Nikki and Allen are fantastic hosts the park is well maintained and modern amenities are clean. Great stay for any demographic. Great spot too.

Awesome accommodation.
Spacious cabin.
Great views.
Coded boom gate entry.
Close to food outlets.
We did some camping 🏕️ pretty good 😜👍

We were using powered camping sites.
Never knew it could be sandy.
Good for fishing with boats.
Nothing for kids

Close to brisbane and gold coast, big thumb up for dog friendly

Great place for a quick canping trip. Had a beautiful spot with a view. The amenities are beautiful and clean, and the service was great. Close to everything, even dinner, if you can't be bothered cooking.

Love this place. Definitely coming back
Midges are friendly....

Great little park and the owner/managers were very obliging and friendly contrary to some reports.
Great new amenity blocks really top notch, camp kitchen one of the cleanest iv seen and the undercover areas overlooking the ramp are above and beyond.
Local shops and pub across the road you really don't need to travel anywhere for anything if you don't want to, fish and chip shop across the road was hit and miss (I'd suggest going outside of peak times)
Only a few downsides, 1. Lack of WiFi in today's world. 2. A second amenity block to take the pressure off peak times would help.
Great location. The park has great amenities. Close to the boat ramp.

My husband’s asthma played up while we were in cabin 4. The last day as I was packing I checked under the bed for any belongings and the dust and mess I’m surprised my husband didn’t has an asthma attack. One tea towel for 6 days only enough dish washing liquid for 2 lots of dishes. Floors discussing.

We rented out all the cabins recently for a family event, the rooms where dirty and not cleaned properly, the toilet paper was less then half a roll when first arrived. Shower in 1 room was a cockroach and  it was like you had just swwpet everything into a corner. Very disappointing.
Just came back after 2 nights, with all my family what a good spot for fishing and watching the boats going in and out, the gradkids loved it, we all had a great time. 😘🤩😍👏🙌
Stayed for 2 week's lovely caravan park  Friendly staff good clean amenities.
We stayed for 11 nights and had a great time.  Close to the water, local Tav, bottle shop, best bakery, fish n chips.  Great value 💕
We have been here for almost a week now and it has been great. So relaxing. The amenities are lovely and clean and grounds are very tidy.
great place and best  staff
